Verification passed end-to-end: `4/4` official examples and `1000/1000` generated examples. The generator matches the task family by building odd square grids with zero background, 3-5 centered horizontally symmetric monochrome motifs stacked across consecutive interior rows, then deriving the output by vertically mirroring each motif object.
